paper.title: A People-First AI Fund: $50M to support nonprofits
paper.abstract: Applications are now open for OpenAI’s People-First AI Fund, a $50M initiative supporting U.S. nonprofits advancing education, community innovation, and economic opportunity. Apply by October 8, 2025, for unrestricted grants that help communities shape AI for the public good.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
